backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting six implemented features including splash screen, header, user greeting, batting/bowling analysis buttons, and about section with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose and functionality.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark themes, including app-specific design tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script reference for the React application titled 'Narendra Biomechanics Cricket Analysis'.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component managing splash screen, analysis modes (batting/bowling), about/pro messages, and footer with state-driven UI transitions.
frontend/src/components/AnalysisBox.tsx: Modal component for video upload with file selection, preview, and simulated AI analysis animation for batting or bowling modes.
frontend/src/components/AnalysisButton.t: Reusable button component displaying an emoji and Hindi label with hover effects for analysis options.
frontend/src/components/AppHeader.tsx: Header component displaying the app title in Hindi with dark blue background styling.
frontend/src/components/MessageDisplay.t: Modal component for displaying titled messages with close button functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProButton.tsx: Special gradient button with animated shimmer effect for the pro live coach feature.
frontend/src/components/SplashScreen.tsx: Full-screen splash component displaying creator name and subtitle in Hindi with fade-in animations.
frontend/src/components/UserGreeting.tsx: Component displaying Hindi greeting with highlighted user ID '#RN-2026' in yellow.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook managing ICP actor creation with Internet Identity authentication and query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file for React Query hooks to interact with the backend; currently empty as no backend operations are needed.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, defining color schemes including custom app colors (primary, header, accent, pro gradient) and animation keyframes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider for state management and authentication.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the theme with custom colors using OKLCH color space, custom animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing a Hindi-language cricket biomechanics analysis app (tribute to Narendra Yadav) with batting/bowling analysis, video upload, splash screen, and dark theme UI features.
